---
title: " "
output: html_document
---


```{r eval=F, echo=F}
setwd(rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file())
filp <- 'vignettes/Graphical.Rmd'
rmarkdown::render(filp)
```

```{r include=FALSE}
library(ManifoldDestiny)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(randNames)
library(openxlsx)
library(patchwork)
library(writexl)
library(plotly)
library(ViewPipeSteps)
library(RefManageR)
library(ggpubr)
```


```{r, eval=T, echo=F, message=F, warning=F}
### Loading equations
#setwd(rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file())
source('script/stylized.R')
load("~/research/ManifoldDestiny/data/eqpar.rda")
modlat <- eqpar$meql
```


# Graphical: Fair election process
## Tab 1
## Tab 2
## Tab 3	
## Tab 4

# Rigged election process: Fair election process
## Tab 1
## Tab 2
## Tab 3	
## Tab 4


Writfe more here

```{r}

```
